---
title: "Concepts"
lang: en
---

<!-- The roles of MADOCA-PPP / raw / CON (OS-independent, the thick chapter). -->

## MADOCA-PPP

TODO: What MADOCA-PPP is and why it matters.

## The two data streams: raw and CON

TODO: Explain the raw observation stream vs. the correction (CON) stream,
and why the container needs both COM ports.

## How convergence works

TODO: Conceptual explanation that sets up the "convergence curve" chapter.
